Package org.apache.juneau.marshall.stream

Interface TokenReadable

All Superinterfaces:
RecordReadable
All Known Implementing Classes:
CborParser, CborParser.Base64, CborParser.SpacedHex, CborParserSession, Json5lParser, Json5lParserSession, Json5Parser, Json5ParserSession, JsonlParser, JsonlParserSession, JsonParser, JsonParserSession, MsgPackParser, MsgPackParser.Base64, MsgPackParser.SpacedHex, MsgPackParserSession
public interface TokenReadable extends RecordReadable
Capability role for parsers that additionally expose the structural TokenReader cursor (FULL formats: json, json5, jsonl, cbor, msgpack).

Because TokenReader IS-A RecordReader, FULL formats get the record surface for free — the parseRecords(Object) default returns parseTokens(Object). Capability is detected via instanceof; a format that supports tokens is a TokenReadable (and transitively a RecordReadable).

See Also:
  • TokenWritable — the symmetric writer role.
  • Serializers and Parsers

    default RecordReader
    parseRecords(Object input)
    FULL formats get record semantics for free — a TokenReader IS-A RecordReader.
    TokenReader
    parseTokens(Object input)
    Opens a low-level TokenReader cursor over the specified input.

    Methods inherited from interface org.apache.juneau.marshall.stream.RecordReadable

    isRecordStreaming

  • Method Details

    • parseTokens

      TokenReader parseTokens(Object input) throws IOException
      Opens a low-level TokenReader cursor over the specified input.
      Parameters:
      input - The input. Subtypes define the supported types (typically Reader / CharSequence / InputStream / byte[] / File).
      Returns:
      A new TokenReader cursor positioned at TokenType.NOT_AVAILABLE.
      Throws:
      IOException - If a problem occurred reading the underlying input.

    • parseRecords

      default RecordReader parseRecords(Object input) throws IOException
      FULL formats get record semantics for free — a TokenReader IS-A RecordReader.
      Specified by:
      parseRecords in interface RecordReadable
      Parameters:
      input - The input.
      Returns:
      A new RecordReader cursor (the same object as parseTokens(Object)).
      Throws:
      IOException - If a problem occurred reading the underlying input.
